nodes.name: Schedule (Mon-Fri 09:00)
nodes.notes: Default: 09:00 Europe/Madrid, Mon-Fri. Configure schedule in node settings. Timezone is set at workflow level in workflow settings.

nodes.name: Fetch Ops Snapshot
nodes.notes: GET /internal/ops/snapshot — system-level counts for the header line. SETUP: change URL to your OpenClaw API base. Auth is handled by the Header Auth credential (X-API-Key).

nodes.name: Fetch Daily Actions
nodes.notes: GET /internal/daily-actions — the core data surface. SETUP: change URL to your OpenClaw API base. Auth is handled by the Header Auth credential (X-API-Key).

nodes.name: Format Telegram Message
nodes.notes: Formats the merged API data into a single Telegram-ready text message. HOY PRIMERO section picks top 5 most actionable items across categories.

nodes.name: Send to Telegram
nodes.notes: SETUP: 1) Create Telegram API credential with your bot token. 2) Replace CONFIGURE_ME with your Telegram chat ID.
